mainEntity.name: Timeline for Perplexity results in competitive Chicago markets?
mainEntity.text: Timeline for Perplexity results in competitive Chicago markets?

acceptedAnswer.text: Competitive Chicago practices like PI take 9-18 months; niche areas like immigration 4-6 months.

suggestedAnswer.text: Accelerate with weekly content drops and PR. Chicago firms benchmark against top 25 lists.
